columns.player_id: ESPN internal player id (NOT gsis_id/sleeper_id -- crosswalk not yet built)
columns.full_name: player full name (join risk -- name-based, per §3 human-confirmed only)
columns.average_draft_position: this league's ESPN ADP -- PRIMARY market source per D-005
columns.percent_owned: percent of ESPN leagues rostering this player
columns.percent_started: percent of ESPN leagues starting this player
